title: Light Craft - FPS Boost Max
description: -> Boost -> your in-game performance as MUCH as POSSIBLE and play with all extras from OptiFine! Huge diffrence! -> 26.2 is now available ✔
body:
⚠️ Requires Modrinth App » Playing Modpacks | Modrinth App

Light Craft | The best FPS Boost Pack by MoonPlay Team

Increase your FPS in-game (more FPS than OptiFine) and add useful extras!

Latest Version » 26.1.2 - 7.2.6 (Recommended) / 26.2 - 8.0.0b

Don't you need OptiFine add-ons for LightCraft? Do you only care about a basic FPS Boost? You can download the Light Craft Lite!

Do you want to set up your own server? Try our Server Pack (available on CurseForge or Bisect Hosting) Fabric Server optimized as much as possible.

  

Why should you choose Light Craft instead of OptiFine and other modpacks?

» That modpack is much faster than OptiFine 📈

» Support for capes (including OptiFine capes), which you can also get for FREE!

» All major features from OptiFine such as Shaders, Zoom, Dynamic Lights, Resource Packs, etc. are included in this Modpack.

» Bug Fixes 🐞

» Weekly Updates

» You can play using a Controller 🎮

» You can add mods by yourself (for ex. in game voice chat, map, essential etc.)

» Clean UI

» Huge FPS Boost!

 

NVIDIA RTX 2060 - Intel Core I5 10400F - SEED: "test" - 2 chunks - (Test date: 13.05.2025)

⚠️Please remember that the results may vary for each individual depending on drivers version, the graphics card brand and its version, the installed operating system, processor, etc.⚠️

Vanilla » 984 FPS

Optifine (HD_U_J3) » 1008 FPS

Fabously Optimized (9.0.0-beta.1) » 697 FPS (Probably a bug in the modpack?)


Light Craft (6.1.0) » 1702 FPS <- WINNER

 

 

Q: Why does Light Craft disable features like Dynamic Lights, Particles, Better Grass by default?
A: To maximize FPS. You can enable them anytime in the settings.

Q: Do I need OptiFine?
A: No! Light Craft is powered by a modern Fabric/Sodium base – no OptiFine needed.

Q: Can I add other mods?
A: Yes. Light Craft is compatible with most popular utility mods.

 

| Minimum Server RAM: 2GB | Recommended Server RAM: 4GB | Minimum Allocated RAM: 2GB+ |
